issues.description: First effect missing condition: '[On Play] If your Leader has the {ODYSSEY} type' requires LeaderHasType:ODYSSEY condition, but condition is absent

Action type incorrect: 'GiveDon' is not appropriate for 'set up to 3 of your DON!! cards as active' — should use 'AttachDon' or similar mechanic to activate DON cards. GiveDon gives new DON tokens; this sets existing ones active
Trigger incorrect: text says '[On Your Opponent's Attack]' which is OnAttack (opponent's action), not OnAttacked (being attacked). Should be 'OnAttack' with opponent context

Action sequence wrong: effect says 'You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards' (conditional payment), but Rest action is listed as mandatory first action. Cost actions should be separate or properly marked as optional costs

Duration context: '[during this battle]' applies to the power boost only, but OnAttack trigger with 'During Opponent's Attack' should use duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' for the overall effect window, with inner action having 'EndOfBattle'
